heading: Recover Your Account
description: Enter the email address associated with your account. You will be asked to verify your identity by answering your security questions before you can reset your password.

step2.heading: Verify your identity
step2.description: Answer your security questions to confirm it's really you.

step3.heading: Create a new password
step3.description: Choose a strong password you haven't used before.
step3.weak: Your password doesn't meet all the requirements yet.

success.heading: Your password has been reset
success.body: You can now sign in with your new password.

questions.firstSchool: What was the name of your first school?
questions.firstPet: What was the name of your first pet?
